name: Humana Inc.
description: Humana Inc. is a leading health and well-being company committed to helping its millions of medical and specialty members achieve their best health. Headquartered in Louisville, Kentucky, Humana is a pioneer in integrating care delivery, pharmacy services, and health insurance. The company offers a wide range of insurance products and health and wellness services, including Medicare plans, Medicaid coverage, and commercial plans, designed to simplify the healthcare experience and improve clinical outcomes.
